overview.title: Personal cash flow studio
overview.description: Track how money moves across spending categories and transaction types.

categories.title: Spending categories
categories.empty: Category insights will appear after importing data.

transactions.title: Manage entries
transactions.description: Add manual entries, tidy imports, and keep your ledger accurate.
transactions.listDesc: Review, edit, or clean up entries from imports and manual adds.
transactions.emptyDesc: Import a CSV for bulk entries or add a manual transaction.
transactions.filterCategoryHelp: Narrow the list to a single spending category.
transactions.filterTypeHelp: Show only a single transaction type.

form.title: Add transaction
form.description: Capture manual entries like cash spending or transfers.
form.dateHelp: Use the posting date from your statement.
form.name: Name
form.nameHelp: Keep it short so it's easy to scan.

salesSplit.title: Sales split
salesSplit.description: Define what percentage of your income you want to keep for taxes, savings, or any other purpose.
salesSplit.overLimitDesc: Your rules exceed 100% of income. Reduce percentages to get accurate amounts.
salesSplit.noRules: No rules yet. Add your first rule above.

incomeCategories.title: Income categories
incomeCategories.description: Define custom categories for classifying your income transactions.
incomeCategories.noCategories: No categories yet. Add your first category above.

auth.forbiddenDesc: Your account is not allowed to sign in.
auth.anonDesc: Data imported while anonymous is not stored.
